title: Freedom from the Known
author: J Krishnamurti
description: A profound exploration of the nature of thought and the self.
keyPoints: The nature of self and identity

title: The 12 Week Year
author: Brian P. Moran, Michael Lennington
description: A practical execution system for compressing annual goals into focused 12-week cycles.
keyPoints: Plan work in focused 12-week execution cycles
Create weekly scorecards and accountability rhythms
Build urgency around the highest-leverage goals
